listitem.para: Distinguish German communication practices between family and outsiders.
What protocol does Germans expect with a “closed door”?
Describe taboo behaviors for German adolescents.
Name and describe at least three genetic diseases common among Germans.
What are the primary foods a German might use while recuperating from and illness?
Describe some prescriptive and restrictive German postpartum practices.
What might you do to encourage a stoic German to accept pain medication?
How is mental illness perceived by Germans?
Identify at least three common folk remedies commonly used by Germans.
